citation_map.claim: GrapheneOS officially supports Google Pixel 9 and Pixel 10 series devices, while Pixel 6 series devices will reach EOL in October 2026.

primary_source.title: GrapheneOS FAQ - Supported Devices
primary_source.authoritativeness: Primary developer documentation detailing device hardware compatibility and software lifecycle support plans.

secondary_source.title: Google Pixel Update Bulletins - Hardware Support Lifecycles
secondary_source.authoritativeness: Official Google device manufacturer support site outlining exact EOL dates for Pixel 6 series devices (October 2026).

citation_map.claim: Qubes OS 4.3.0 was released in December 2025 as the recommended stable release; the Qubes 4.2 series reaches EOL on June 21, 2026.

primary_source.title: Qubes OS - Supported Releases
primary_source.authoritativeness: Official project developer release cycle chart detailing release and support/EOL dates.

secondary_source.title: LWN Qubes OS 4.3 Release Announcement
secondary_source.authoritativeness: Highly reputable open-source software news archive documenting the official stable release and developer notes.

citation_map.claim: Signal Usernames and Phone Number Privacy (introduced in early 2024) permit hiding physical SIM numbers and preventing discovery by contacts.

primary_source.title: Signal Blog - Keep your phone number private with usernames
primary_source.authoritativeness: Official developer release announcement explaining the technical details and usage configurations.

secondary_source.title: EFF Surveillance Self-Defense (SSD) - Signal Hardening Guide
secondary_source.authoritativeness: Gold-standard non-profit digital rights advocacy guide endorsing Signal's phone number concealment features.

citation_map.claim: Monero implemented the Full-Chain Membership Proofs (FCMP++) upgrade in early 2026, expanding the transaction anonymity set to the entire blockchain.

primary_source.title: GetMonero Project - FCMP++ Security Upgrade
primary_source.authoritativeness: Official cryptocurrency network developer release portal and cryptographic specifications.

secondary_source.title: TRM Labs Monero Regulatory Delistings and Privacy Analysis
secondary_source.authoritativeness: Leading blockchain analytics and regulatory compliance firm detailing exchange shifts and Monero's active privacy architecture.

citation_map.claim: Apple and Google finalized the joint Detecting Unwanted Location Trackers (DULT) industry specification to natively alert users to nearby tracking beacons.

primary_source.title: Apple Newsroom - Support for Unwanted Tracker Alerts
primary_source.authoritativeness: Official manufacturer corporate news announcement detailing the finalized standard and OS integration.

secondary_source.title: Google Safety & Emergency Support - Unknown Tracker Alerts
secondary_source.authoritativeness: Official operating system help documents detailing settings, DULT specifications, and manual bluetooth scanning.

citation_map.claim: The secure cloud storage guide recommends verified end-to-end encrypted storage and collaboration suites including Swiss-based Proton Drive and Filen.

primary_source.title: Proton Drive Security Architecture Whitepaper
primary_source.authoritativeness: Swiss-based encrypted email and drive developer detailing zero-knowledge client-side encryption and independent audit reports.

secondary_source.title: Filen Privacy and Encryption Standards
secondary_source.authoritativeness: German-based open-source E2EE cloud developer outlining strict AES-256 client-side zero-knowledge architecture.

citation_map.claim: The National Lawyers Guild (NLG) Chicago chapter provides dedicated legal support hotlines for civic organizers and activists in Illinois.

primary_source.title: National Lawyers Guild Chicago Chapter
primary_source.authoritativeness: Primary local chapter organization page listing active legal support phone numbers, legal observer programs, and KYR training.

secondary_source.title: Illinois General Assembly - Illinois Compiled Statutes (ILCS)
secondary_source.authoritativeness: Official state legislature statute database verifying Illinois-specific stop-and-identify laws and detainment requirements.
